name: Computer Science Minor
description: For SFE students looking to deepen their computer science foundation. Covers core CS theory including algorithms and data structures.

requirementGroups.label: CSC or SFE Upper Level Elective

overlapNotes: CSC 144, CSC 145 overlap with BS SFE core
CSC 204 / SFE 204 overlaps with BS SFE core
CSC 344 is an additional course not in BS SFE

name: Software Engineering Minor
description: For CS students wanting formal software engineering training. Covers requirements, architecture, process, and quality assurance.

requirementGroups.label: SFE or CSC Upper Level Elective

overlapNotes: SFE 204 / CSC 204 overlaps with BS CS core
SFE 240 overlaps with BS CS core
SFE 112, SFE 224, SFE 384 are additional courses not in BS CS

name: Cybersecurity Minor
description: Available to any major. Covers networking, cryptography, and the three Cybersecurity course sequence.
overlapNotes: SFE 240 overlaps with BS CS and BS SFE core
CSC 330 / MTH 330 / SFE 330 counts as Cybersecurity Elective in BS SFE
SFE 364, SFE 365, SFE 366 are the full cybersecurity sequence — already required in SFE Cybersecurity Concentration
